user_input: Take a look, it's so breaking

content: I have completely overhauled the `meta-ads-smm-s2.html` file to resolve the cropping and consistency issues you highlighted in the screenshot. Here is exactly what I fixed: 1. **Restored the Solid Brand Icons:** I noticed the previous static file accidentally reverted your solid WhatsApp and Instagram icons back to thin wireframes. I've restored the heavy, solid-fill SVG icons so they balance perfectly against the bold typography. 2. **Rebuilt with CSS Flexbox:** The "breaking" and overlapping was caused by rigid absolute positioning (`top: 740px`, etc.) that failed when text wrapped. I stripped all the absolute positioning out of the text elements and rebuilt the canvas using CSS Flexbox. The typography will now safely push content down without overlapping. 3. **Fixed the Squishing / Cropping:** I added `flex-wrap: wrap;` and `flex-shrink: 0;` to the workspace wrappers. When you view the design at 100% zoom on a smaller screen, the Feed and Story canvases will now stack cleanly instead of squishing and clipping off the right edge. 4. **Reliable Logo Scaling:** The Peoplez logo is now rendered as a true HTML `` tag instead of a CSS background, constrained precisely to `250px` max-height for Feed and `320px` for Story, ensuring it never gets cropped regardless of the screen size. The updated file is already written to your project. Check the preview pane to see the pixel-perfect layout.
